headline: Citizens Financial Group to Participate in the Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference 2026
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., May 06, 2026--Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE: CFG) announced today that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bruce Van Saun will participate in the Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference 2026 to be held on Friday, May 29, 2026 at 9:00 am ET.
